Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xCC80 "GALACTICGARDENER-CC80" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Galactic Gardener.prg"
Metadata.Notes: To dump, set breakpoint at $8164. Then using $CC80 as the entry point skips the manual protection.
